text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. I finished my prayers for our first shrine
visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have set just one goal for this year: conquering
the spring Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list:
It's time to show the world how hard you've
worked.

It's time to show the world how hard you've
worked.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I've definitely grown stronger in the time I've
spent with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All that remains now is to transform my hard work
into real results. I shall win without fail.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, what should we do when we return to
the academy today?
choice_data_list: It's the start of the new year, so let's relax.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, what should we do when we return to
the academy today?
choice_data_list: It's the start of the new year, so let's relax.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Being impatient now would do more
harm than good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must maintain composure in light of this
tremendous goal I have set.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's relax today so we may start off the new year
fresh and with presence of mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Our usual... Yes, that's quite important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We must commit ourselves to a steady routine to
avoid falling complacent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Since it's the beginning of the year, I must take
care not to forget my resolution.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My, aren't we in a festive mood?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Even so, I admit I'm a little intrigued by—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. I suppose there's no point in trying to
convince you otherwise. Very well. If that's what
you wish, I shall accompany you.
